---
title : "UCB"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: zephyr
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg; Pkg.activate(".."); Pkg.status()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using CairoMakie, Statistics, Random
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
seed = 4
Random.seed!(seed)

nrep = 1
k = 10
maxt = 10_000
means = rand(k)
rewards = zeros(maxt, nrep)

upper_bounds = zeros(k, maxt)
lower_bounds = zeros(k, maxt)

irep = 1
rewards_per_arm = Float64.(rand(k) .< means)
rewards[1:k, irep] = rewards_per_arm
ns = ones(k)
rho = 2 * log(k)
upper_bounds[:, k] = rewards_per_arm ./ ns .+ sqrt.(0.5 * rho ./ ns)
lower_bounds[:, k] = rewards_per_arm ./ ns .- sqrt.(0.5 * rho ./ ns)

for t = k+1:maxt
    arm = argmax(upper_bounds[:, t-1])
    reward = Float64(rand() < means[arm])
    rewards[t, irep] = reward
    rewards_per_arm[arm] += reward
    ns[arm] += 1
    rho = 2 * log(t)
    upper_bounds[:, t] = rewards_per_arm ./ ns .+ sqrt.(0.5 * rho ./ ns)
    lower_bounds[:, t] = rewards_per_arm ./ ns .- sqrt.(0.5 * rho ./ ns)
end
```

```{julia}
nrep = 100
k = 10
maxt = 10_000
means = rand(k)
rewards = zeros(maxt, nrep)

for irep = 1:nrep
    rewards_per_arm = Float64.(rand(k) .< means)
    rewards[1:k, irep] = rewards_per_arm
    ns = ones(k)
    rho = 2 * log(k)
    upper_bounds_2 = rewards_per_arm ./ ns .+ sqrt.(0.5 * rho ./ ns)

    for t = k+1:maxt
        arm = argmax(upper_bounds_2)
        reward = Float64(rand() < means[arm])
        rewards[t, irep] = reward
        rewards_per_arm[arm] += reward
        ns[arm] += 1
        rho = 2 * log(t)
        upper_bounds_2 = rewards_per_arm ./ ns .+ sqrt.(0.5 * rho ./ ns)
    end
end

regret_matrix = cumsum(maximum(means) .- rewards, dims=1)
perf = vec(mean(regret_matrix, dims=2))
stdperf = vec(std(regret_matrix, dims=2))

t_fit = Int(maxt/10):maxt
x_fit = log.(t_fit)
X = hcat(x_fit, ones(length(t_fit)))
a, b = X \ perf[t_fit]
```

```{julia}
fig = Figure(size=(1000, 500))

ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1], xlabel="t", ylabel="mean values", title="confidence bounds")
for i = 1:k
    lines!(ax1, k:maxt, lower_bounds[i, k:maxt], color=red, linewidth=2)
    lines!(ax1, k:maxt, upper_bounds[i, k:maxt], color=blue, linewidth=2)
end

elem_lower = LineElement(color=red, linewidth=2)
elem_upper = LineElement(color=blue, linewidth=2)
axislegend(ax1, [elem_lower, elem_upper], ["lower", "upper"])

ax2 = Axis(fig[1, 2], xlabel="t", ylabel="regret", title="regret")
lines!(ax2, 1:maxt, perf, color=red, linewidth=2, label="observation")
lines!(ax2, 1:maxt, log.(1:maxt) .* a .+ b, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="fit: a+b*log(t)")
axislegend(ax2, position=:rb)
xlims!(ax2, 1, maxt)
ylims!(ax2, 0, 220)

fig
```
